response.justification: Strong software engineering foundation with 20+ years industry experience and current direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but falls significantly short of the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—only ~1 year demonstrated in GenAI domain. While current trajectory is promising and technical skills (TypeScript, AWS, system design) align well, lacks documented experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, and AI-specific data pipelines. Could be a strong candidate after additional AI/GenAI tenure, but currently underqualified on the primary experience requirement.
strengths: Current role directly addresses GenAI infrastructure and MCP code generation, showing relevant momentum in the required domain
20+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, and infrastructure, demonstrating ability to deliver complex systems at scale
Deep TypeScript expertise and AWS cloud platform experience with proven staff-level technical leadership across multiple organizations
concerns: Only ~1 year of demonstrated AI/GenAI production work versus the required 8+ years—substantial gap on primary qualification
No documented experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques critical to the role
Python not mentioned despite being a standard AI/ML language; AI data pipeline experience not evident (only infrastructure-level data handling at Dunnhumby)

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and Agentic Workflow Role
Missing Vector DB, RAG, and LLM Architecture Knowledge
